label: Wealth & Abundance
description: Remedies to attract money, abundance, remove debt, and grow wealth

remedies.title: Cinnamon Abundance Blow
remedies.timing: 1st of every month, Amavasya, Festivals, or Full Moon
process: Take the cinnamon powder in your hand.
With the index finger of the other hand, swirl the cinnamon while creating your intention.
Stand outside the entrance door of your home looking inside.
Repeat your intention till you believe it, feel it and see it.
Blow onto the powder and let it sprinkle inside your home.
Step into your home and blow all the powder as you keep walking in.
notes: Don't wash your hands after blowing. Rub them together and absorb all the energy.
Don't get the cinnamon powder swept till at least 24 hours.
remedies.sampleIntention: I blow in abundance, prosperity and happiness. It enters this space with ease, joy & grace. So it is. Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

remedies.title: Cinnamon Stick Abundance Charm
process: Think about what you desire.
Roll the currency note and put it inside the hole in the cinnamon stick (or roll it around the stick).
Roll the mouli around the cinnamon stick 7 or 11 times and tie it.
Energize with your intention.
Keep it in your purse or wallet.
benefits: Makes one aware of their patterns of victimisation and blame
remedies.note: One can also use currency note of another country as long as it is of a higher value.

remedies.title: Cinnamon Oil Money Spell
ingredients: 1 currency note of the highest denomination
process: Think about what you desire to create.
Take a little oil on the 3 middle fingers of your dominant hand.
Keep the note in front of you.
Draw 3 lines using 3 fingers on the currency note.
Meditate for 3-6 minutes holding your intention.
See your desire being fulfilled, feel it, live it, visualize it.
Keep it in your wallet for as long as possible.
Once it is used, do the same ritual with another note.
remedies.note: It's ok to spend this currency note.

remedies.title: Wealth Spell (Cinnamon & Sugar)
process: Mix both of them.
Energize and charge them with your intention.
Sprinkle it in the doorway of your office and/or home.
Leave it for 24 hours and then get it cleaned.
benefits: Will increase sweetness and peace in your life
Will allow money to come to you with ease
Will increase the flow of money

remedies.title: Magical Money Spell (Cinnamon Paste)
process: Mix the powder, desi ghee and rose water/essential oil together to create a thick batter.
Ensure that this paste is not runny.
Go to your main door.
Take some paste on your 3 center fingers, then starting from the bottom on any side spread it on the outside of your main door on all 4 sides.
Ensure that you end at the starting point.
notes: There will be some colour to this paste.
When cleaning every day, the paste will automatically lighten.
Repeat only on Diwali regardless of the day it falls.

remedies.title: Money Found on Ground Remedy
remedies.timing: When you find money lying on the ground
process: When you find any money lying on the ground, pick it up and take it.
Take a glass bowl and put the currency in it along with the pyrite.
Then keep this bowl in the west corner of your home/room.
remedies.benefits: Will help you attract more money.

remedies.title: Maintain Flow of Money (Salt Water & Red Bulb)
process: Fill the glass with water.
Mix salt in it.
In the south east corner of your home put a red bulb which needs to be lit 24/7.
Keep this glass in front of the bulb.
Once the water dries naturally wash the glass.
Refill it with salt water mix and keep it back.

remedies.title: Star Anise Wallet Remedy
process: Keep it in your wallet.
notes: The star anise will break in your wallet and that's ok.

remedies.title: Growth, Success & Abundance Bundle
process: On the red cloth keep the rose, sandalwood and roli.
Tie it up in a bundle.
Keep it in your home temple/alter.
Worship it everyday.
After 7 days keep it in your locker/cash drawer/wherever you keep your valuables.
remedies.note: Can be done both at home and work place.

remedies.title: Goddess Lakshmi Rose Offering
process: Take out the center of the rose so that there is a small gap in the center.
Put the camphor in it.
Invoke Goddess Lakshmi.
Set your intention.
Put the rose in a diya and light it.
Offer it to Goddess Lakshmi.
Dispose it off as you do the rest of your sacred Pooja items.

remedies.title: Lakshmi Chalisa Money Flow Ritual
remedies.timing: 9 consecutive Fridays or 42 days. Start from a Friday.
process: Start on a Friday.
Before you sit for dinner.
Light the diya in front of Goddess Lakshmi.
Create your intention in front of the goddess.
Chant Shreem 108 times or 1 mala.
If possible do Lakshmi Chalisa every day else every Friday.

remedies.title: Garlic & Cloves Money Pocket Remedy
process: Carry these in your pocket/wallet.
benefits: Save money from being drained out

remedies.title: Kitchen Diya for Wealth
remedies.timing: After dinner is over and kitchen is cleaned
process: Put the camphor & cloves in the diya.
After dinner is over, clean your kitchen.
Light the diya in your kitchen.

remedies.title: Feed Cow Coriander for Poverty Removal
process: Feed fresh coriander to a cow.

remedies.title: Coriander Seeds Savings Ritual
process: On a Friday keep the coriander seeds in a bowl.
Offer this to Maha Lakshmi.
Chant any Lakshmi Mantra or Shreem (श्री).
Then take the coriander seeds and put them in the pouch or tie it up in the fabric.
Keep this in your locker.
benefits: Stops unnecessary loss and wastage of money

remedies.title: Maha Lakshmi 5 Diya Ritual
process: Prepare 5 diyas.
Place the different wicks in the diyas.
Fill the diyas with ghee and light them in front of Maha Lakshmi.
Offer sweets, cut fruits, and the food made at home.
Sprinkle or offer rose water with reverence.
Pray to Maha Lakshmi for abundance, blessings, and prosperity.
Stay calm and focused while keeping your intention pure and grateful.
benefits: Creates a sacred and uplifting atmosphere

remedies.title: Cinnamon Oil Business Card Remedy
process: Take your business card.
Rub the cinnamon oil all around it on both sides.
Tell the card what you want it to bring in your life.
Keep it in your wallet.
Don't use this card.
remedies.benefits: Attracts customers and protects your business from negative energies and evil eye.
remedies.note: If you want to give out this card, repeat the same process with all the cards you want to carry.

remedies.title: Cinnamon Doorstep for Attracting Customers
process: Hold the cinnamon or jar in your hand and energize it with your intention.
Sprinkle cinnamon powder across your doorstep, main entrance and the door to your workplace.
If working from home, sprinkle it around the entrance of your home/room.
remedies.benefits: Attracts customers and protects business premises from negative energies.

remedies.title: Betel Nut for Right Career Path
process: Offer it to Ganesha every Wednesday with the intention of finding the right path.
It can be offered in a temple inside or outside your home.
If you offer it at home, collect them for a few weeks and then go give it in any Ganesha temple.
remedies.benefits: Will give clarity and help you choose the right path.

remedies.title: Salt Rotation for Job or Business
remedies.purpose: Get a Job or Improve Business
process: Take some salt in your palm.
Close your hand making a fist.
Rotate this salt on your head 3 times in any direction.
Throw it outside or flush it in the urinal.
when: When one is not getting a job

remedies.title: Vishnu Temple Business Recovery
process: Wrap the coconut in the fabric.
Keep the janeu and sweets with it.
Offer everything in a Vishnu temple.
Repeat as per need/choice.
remedies.note: If there is no Vishnu temple this can also be offered in Lakshminarayan or Radha Krishna temple.

remedies.title: Cloves & Camphor Burn for Stuck Money
process: Write the name of the person who has to give you money on the paper.
Put the camphor on it along with the cloves.
Burn it.
Throw the ashes outside your home or bury it.
Repeat till money comes back.

remedies.title: High Position Job Ritual
process: Tie the cloves with the thread.
Put it under your mattress.
Next day throw it out of your door or window.
Repeat for 42 days.

remedies.title: Cloves in Mouth for Interview
remedies.timing: While going for the interview or meeting
process: While going to the venue, invoke whichever God or Goddess you resonate with.
Tell them what you desire from this meeting/interview.
Ask them for help.
When you reach the venue, take both the cloves and put them in your mouth.
Chew the cloves.
When you enter into the meeting room, take a little residue of the clove in your mouth and quietly put it anywhere in the room.
The rest can be eaten or spit.

remedies.title: Coriander Seeds Debt Remedy
process: Put the coriander seeds in the paper.
Fold the paper.
Put it under your mattress.
Next day take out the folded paper and either burn it or throw it in running water.

remedies.title: Tuesday Debt Payment Ritual
remedies.timing: Every Tuesday till the problem gets resolved
process: Mix a little jasmine oil in the sindoor to create a paste.
Make a swastik using the paste on the coconut.
Take the coconut and sweets.
Go to a Hanuman temple.
Offer the coconut and sweets to the god.
Sit in the temple and do 1 complete recitation of Ridmochan Mangal Stotra (ऋणमोचन मंगल स्तोत्र).

remedies.title: Saturday Coconut Debt Removal
ingredients: Black thread (same length as your height)
process: Take a bath and get ready.
Sit somewhere where you won't be disturbed.
Wrap the coconut in the black thread.
Worship the nariyal.
Offer it flowers, fruits, smudge it.
Then immerse it into a body of running water.
As you immerse the coconut pray for relief from debt.

remedies.title: Monday Relief from Multiple Debts
process: After taking a bath and getting ready.
Put everything in the handkerchief and knot it.
Go to any Vishnu Lakshmi temple, Lakshmi Narayan temple or Radha Krishna temple.
Holding this bundle in your hands chant Gayatri Mantra 21 times.
Then go to some place where there is running water and throw this bundle in running water.

remedies.title: 5 Red Roses Debt Release
process: Tie 1 rose each to end of the fabric.
Tie the 5th rose to the center of the fabric with the help of kalawa (mouli).
Then throw it into a body of running water.
As you immerse the bundle pray for relief from debt.
benefits: Will help you release your debts
Will also help in attracting prosperity

remedies.title: Coriander Seeds Recover Stuck Money
process: Write the name of the person who is holding on to your money.
Put some coriander seeds on the paper.
Fold the paper from all sides.
Without telling anyone, throw it in running water.

remedies.title: Coriander Seeds Diwali Remedy
remedies.purpose: Attract Opportunities, Wealth and Good Luck
remedies.timing: On the night of Ganesh Lakshmi Poojan on Diwali
process: Keep seeds in a small bowl.
Place the bowl in Ganesh Lakshmi Pooja.
Next day, plant 50% of the seeds in soil.
Grind the rest and use for cooking.
Use the coriander as it grows in your food.
remedies.benefits: Attracts opportunities, wealth, and much more.

remedies.title: Nutmeg Job/Business Meeting Bath
remedies.purpose: Get a Good Job or Successful Business Meeting
process: Coarsely grind the nutmegs.
Take water in a vessel.
Add nutmeg, honey and vinegar.
Boil for 20-25 minutes.
Cool, strain and store.
Mix in bathing water before interviews/meetings.

remedies.title: Abundance Floor Wash
process: Take a pan of water.
Add cloves and cinnamon.
Move index finger in circular motion while chanting/focusing intention.
Boil for 20-25 minutes.
Let cool, strain, store in glass bottle.
Add 2 tablespoons to mopping water.
Mop floors with this water.
benefits: Protects against black magic and evil eye

remedies.title: Cinnamon Bath for Money
remedies.timing: Use as last rinse while bathing every day. Stop once engaged/married.
process: Mix all three in half a bucket of bathing water.
Use as last rinse while bathing every day.
remedies.note: Turmeric - strengthens jupiter. Salt - removes negativity. Alum - gives protection.

remedies.title: Abundance Salt
process: Pour the salt in the jar.
Add the cloves.
Use for cooking, seasoning etc.
benefits: Ensures continuous and harmonious flow of abundance

remedies.title: Good Luck Mojo Bag
remedies.purpose: Good Luck & Protection from Evil Eye
process: Put the star anise in the pouch.
Charge it with your intention.
Carry it with you.
remedies.benefits: Acts like a road opener, brings good luck, and protects from the evil eye.

remedies.title: Nutmeg Good Luck Charm for Gamblers
remedies.purpose: Good Luck for Gamblers & Winning Situations
process: Carry the nutmeg in a green mojo bag when going for gambling, casino, tender events, job interviews, share market, or important business meetings.

remedies.title: Nutmeg Powder in Shoes
process: Sprinkle some nutmeg powder in your shoes while going out for gambling.

remedies.title: Prosperity Hanging (Cinnamon Bundles)
process: Make bundles of cinnamon sticks.
Tie them with the thread.
Hang them near doors, window sills etc.
